Package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics

package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
  • Class
    Description
    DiagnosticCheck
    A single runtime diagnostic check.
    DiagnosticContext
    Context exposed to diagnostic checks.
    DiagnosticMode
    Execution mode for runtime diagnostics.
    DiagnosticRegistry
    Mutable registry of available runtime checks.
    DiagnosticReport
    Aggregated runtime diagnostics report.
    DiagnosticReports
    Rendering and export helpers for diagnostics reports.
    DiagnosticResult
    Result of a single diagnostic check.
    DiagnosticRunRequest
    Runtime diagnostics execution options.
    DiagnosticsCommandSupport
    Reusable diagnostics subcommand helper.
    DiagnosticSeverity
    Importance of a check when it fails.
    DiagnosticsService
    Service for executing and exporting runtime diagnostics.
    DiagnosticsSupport
    Factory and runtime wiring helpers for diagnostics.
    DiagnosticStatus
    Outcome of a diagnostic check.
    DiagnosticSuiteName
    Typed diagnostics suite argument used by command parsers and suggestions.
    DiagnosticSuiteNameTypeParser<S>
    Parser for diagnostics suite command arguments.
